name: Gracestack FHIR Agent
description: HL7 FHIR R4 integration agent for reading and writing patient journal data including Patient, Observation, Condition, MedicationRequest, AllergyIntolerance, and Encounter resources.

skills.name: Patient Summary
skills.description: Fetch comprehensive FHIR patient summary including conditions, medications, allergies, and recent observations

skills.name: Write Observation
skills.description: Create FHIR Observation resource for triage results and clinical findings

skills.name: Write Encounter
skills.description: Log AI consultation as FHIR Encounter resource

skills.name: Drug Interaction Check
skills.description: Check for drug interactions using MedicationRequest data and FDA adverse event API
